item.title: LEGO DUPLO Wild Animals of The Ocean Set 10972 with Whale and Turtle Sea Animal Figures & Playmat Educational Toys with Fun Colors for Toddlers 2 Plus Years Old
item.description: There’s a deal LEGO DUPLO Wild Animals of The Ocean Set 10972 with Whale and Turtle Sea Animal Figures & Playmat Educational Toys with Fun Colors for Toddlers 2 Plus Years Old here: ℹ️: Hands-on play – The colorful playset includes an adult and baby whale, tropical fish and a turtle, which are all easy for toddlers to pick up and place, plus a 3-dimensional undersea playmat Oceans of fun – Playmat measures over 9.
